---
title: "Modern Operations Research with Python"
subtitle: "Numerical Optimization • Machine Learning • Data Analysis"
author: "Troy"
date: today
---

## Welcome

This ebook teaches modern Operations Research using Python, focusing on numerical optimization, machine learning algorithms, and data analysis.

### Current Chapters
- [1. Foundations of Data Analysis for Operations Research](chapters/01-foundations.qmd)
- [2. Linear Programming with PuLP](chapters/02-linear-programming.qmd)

More chapters coming soon.
